name: Fruit Filled Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, soda, spices (cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg), and salt.
2. Add diced candied fruit and candied ginger (if using).
3. Blend shortening and sugar until creamy.
4. Beat in egg, honey, and molasses.
5. Mix in dry ingredients until well combined.
6. Stir in hot water until smooth.
7. Pour batter into a greased 8x8x2-inch pan.
8. Sprinkle with chopped nuts.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
10. For orange glaze, combine sugar and orange juice in a saucepan.
11. Boil mixture for 5 minutes, then remove from heat.
12. Stir in lemon extract.
13. Pour glaze over the cake and return to oven for an additional 10 minutes.
